data.name: 通过主动空间脑和可泛化动作小脑实现人形全身操作
Harmon｜从语言描述生成人形机器人的全身运动
Robot Motion Diffusion Model｜机器人角色的运动生成

data.description: Robot Motion Diffusion Model: Motion Generation for Robotic Characters cites or references HARMON: Whole-Body Motion Generation of Humanoid Robots from Language Descriptions.
HARMON: Whole-Body Motion Generation of Humanoid Robots from Language Descriptions cites or references Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation via Active Spatial Brain and Generalizable Action Cerebellum.
